# AltorLab — Free AI Tools

> AltorLab offers affordable AI-powered tools for everyday creative tasks. AI Room Redesign transforms your room photos into beautiful redesigns for just ₹749. Based in India.

## Tools
- [AI Room Redesign](https://app.altorlab.org/room-redesign): Upload photo, choose style, get redesign (₹749)
- [AI Background Remover](https://app.altorlab.org/tools/background-remover): Remove backgrounds instantly (coming soon, free)
- [AI Tattoo Designer](https://app.altorlab.org/tools/tattoo-designer): Generate tattoo designs from descriptions (coming soon, free)

## Design Styles
- [Modern Room Design](https://app.altorlab.org/styles/modern)
- [Scandinavian Room Design](https://app.altorlab.org/styles/scandinavian)
- [Minimalist Room Design](https://app.altorlab.org/styles/minimalist)

## Blog
- [Best AI Interior Design Tools 2026](https://app.altorlab.org/blog/best-ai-interior-design-tools)
- [Redesign Your Room for ₹749](https://app.altorlab.org/blog/redesign-room-749-rupees)

## Pricing
- AI Room Redesign: ₹749 per design (~$9 USD)
- Background Remover: Free
- Tattoo Designer: Free
